extra_descs.desc: This shows a creative beginning.
Selfishness may spoil the beginning.
Good things are beginning.
Egotism and selfishness will interfere with new beginnings.
The beginnings of victory are in sight.
A good beginning may have a destructive ending.
Financial matters are off to a good start.
Beware of greed or miserliness.
Patience leads to success.
Be patient, a watched pot never boils.
A romance or friendship is beginning.
There are difficulties in a new romance or friendship.
This card shows indecision on which way to go.
A decision is being made but it may be the wrong one.
Good organization leads to being able to handle multiple jobs.
Doing too much at one time can lead to problems.
Good cooperation and partnership will bring success.
Arrogance may lead to trying to do too much at one time.
This is a good time to concentrate on the arts.
Gossip will interfere with your pleasures.
There are difficulties in love due to quarrels.
Romance may be confusing right now.
Your work and skills will be appreciated.
Laziness will lead to mediocrity.
Hard work leads to a feeling of fulfillment.
Appreciate the good things that are happening in your life.
Boredom provides a good time for self reevaluation.
New goals are in sight.
After strife comes a time of rest to gather yourself for future endeavors.
After a rest comes renewed activity.
This card indicates a miserly nature.
Financial problems could be ahead if you aren't careful.
You may have to fight for what you believe in.
Competition may be enjoyable.
If you look closely you will find that not all is lost.
Hope and courage will lead you through difficulties.
Cruelty may lead to defeat.
A feeling of unfairness may interfere with the pleasure of winning.
Financial matters may lead to depression.
Charity will be good for your emotional health.
Advancement will come through hard work.
Good news may be on the way, but delayed.
A pleasant surprise comes out of the past.
Its time to let the past go and live in the present.
This card shows a journey to happier times.
You cannot run away from present problems.
Rewards gained will be shared.
Beware of gifts given that may be bribes.
Your business success depends on your courage and energy.
Beware of indecision and people taking advantage of you.
You are mistaking shadow for substance.
Focusing on the matter with determination will lead to success.
A dishonorable act can lead to failure.
Listen to good advice.
Hard work might eventually lead to success.
This matter may not be worth the work you put into it.
Your goal is approaching.
Jealousy may lead to quarrels.
Your romance may have disappointed you but there is still something there.
Enjoyment and romance may be ahead.
Current matters make you feel tied down.
Problems will soon release their hold on you.
This is a good time to learn new skills.
Be careful of how you use your skills.
You can face whatever comes, if you're prepared for it.

You'd better start thinking ahead because you aren't ready for what lies
ahead of you.
A material wish will be granted.
You aren't happy with what you have.
This card shows that things are not going well with this matter.
Things will get better over time.
Things are going well, do what you enjoy.
Be careful of what you have, you may be losing something.
There are burdens involved but you can manage them.

Try to work out the reasons that things are done.  Be wary of means
justifying bad ends.
This is a card of family love and happiness.
There may be family difficulties here.
Beware of aggressive behavior.  Someone may be plotting.
This may be a good time to fight for what you believe in.
Financial matters are going well.
This is not a good time to take risks.

The person involved can be brilliant and enthusiastic but may become angry
easily.
The person involved is unstable and may be a disappointment.
The person involved is artistic and dreamy.
The person involved is selfish and may use others.
The person involved is diplomatic and understanding.
The person involved is frivolous and should not be trusted.
The person involved is a scholar with a respect for knowledge.
The person involved has a rebellious nature.
The person involved has an impetuous nature.
The person involved can be narrow-minded and disruptive.
The person involved is intelligent and romantic.
The person involved may lie, but not always maliciously.
The person involved is clever and courageous and may arrive unexpectedly.
The person involved may be a troublemaker and a bully.
The person involved is trustworthy but unimaginative.
The person involved is irresponsible.
The person involved is fond of nature and home.
The person involved is honest but domineering.
The person involved may mean well but is not reliable.
The person involved is imaginative and helpful.
The person involved may enjoy gossip.
The person involved is perceptive and has a strong character.
The person involved depends on others for ideas.
The person involved is thoughtful and good at business.
The person involved is strict and sometimes intolerant.
The person involved is agile and passionate.
The person involved is powerful with a violent nature.
The person involved is calm but powerful.
The person involved is obstinate and malicious.
The person involved is commanding but overcautious.
The person involved does not anger easily but can be dangerous.
The person involved is good at mathematics and finances.
Be aware of the reasons behind your choices and make them wisely.
Joys and possibilities may lie ahead if you choose wisely.
Creativity may be used unwisely.  Look for better outlets.
This card shows a person who can turn ideas into reality.

Surface knowledge is not enough.  Dig deeper into your own mind and
understand yourself better.
Not all things can or should be understood.  Some things can only be felt.

This card shows some instability, possibly in family life or financial
matters.
This card shows fertility of thought, mind or body.

Character flaws may be the source of danger, try to use some common sense in
this matter.

This card shows leadership qualities, either in yourself or in someone in a
position of authority over you.

This card shows a desire to be unconventional, a rebellious streak.  At the
same time, it warns against superstition.

This card shows conventionality and conformity.  You are swayed by a need for
social approval.
There are problems, possibly in romance or family life.
A choice is offered, possibly between temptation and romance.
Difficulties lie ahead, be careful of your health.
Hard work leads to success.
Learn how to control your passions.
Love has triumphed over hate, consideration over obstinence.
Learn when to accept advice.
You are open minded enough to accept the wisdom of others.
Things are looking down now but they'll pick up.
Fortune has ups and downs, and right now your luck is up.  Build on it.
The matter in your mind will be affected by prejudice.
The judgment is fair and well balanced.
You may be concentrating too much on the physical side of life.
This would be a good time to concentrate on the spiritual side of life.
This card does not suggest a person's death but the stagnation of a matter.

This card does not suggest a person's death but the rebirth and renewal of a
matter.
Trying to combine different things will not be successful at this time.
This indicates a successful combination of some sort.
Chains binding you to your material side are loosened.

There is a temptation to choose the material over the spiritual.  Watch all
choices carefully.
False accusations will eventually lead to freedom.
Ambition is overthrown, leaving room for new ideas.

Doubts and pessimism will lead to difficult times.  Look for new
inspirations.
Inspiration will lead to good things.
Deceptions are uncovered but watch out for misunderstandings.
Beware of deception, leading to unforeseen perils.
Future plans are in difficulty.  Something will be lost.
Achievements in some area are indicated.
Fears lead to failure.
A sense of renewal leads to a new outlook.
Fear of change makes success difficult.
Triumph and fulfillment in the matter in question.

The large glass, made out of thick, strong glass, has something etched into
one side.

long_desc: A large etched glass waits to be used.

extra_descs.desc:
It's fresh and a bit foamy.  It's not the pale, thin, bluish type of milk.
It looks very creamy.

A tall, clear urn stands here, filled with white foamy liquid.  A protruding
tap allows you to fill your glass with nice, cold milk.

long_desc: A milk urn waits here, hospitably.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a piece of flatbread, warm and comforting.  It has a delicious odor that
seems homelike.

long_desc: A piece of bokolyi sits here, waiting to be eaten.
A quill pen lies here with ink on the nib.
